title: Cauthon Sit
description: A simple yet powerful sitting plugin.
body:
## CauthonSit
CauthonSit is a easy to use sitting plugin using armorstands.

Commands:
  /csit: Sits on the block you are on

Planned Commands:
  /csit_central: Sits on the centre of the block you are on

## Configuration
It is easy to assume server admins wouldnt want people sitting on blocks like liquids so we have a config for it.

![Configuration File Template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/addd1168d592de4e9dce1e1c1705bf9df2fdc354.png)

![Sitting on the edge of the block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47f586e28e7f280d1a57bbd7232a9142454cc6a8.png)

We have a discord now!!! [https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD](https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD)
